name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions an Nginx web server with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed certificate generation, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects, TLS enforcement, security response headers, gzip compression, fail2ban, UFW firewall, SSH hardening, and kernel sysctl hardening.

name: cache
description: Configures an in-memory caching layer by installing and managing both Memcached and Redis (with password authentication), a custom log directory, and a post-processing ruby_block that strips deprecated Redis configuration directives from the generated config file.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI web application by installing system packages, cloning the app from GitHub, creating a Python virtual environment, configuring PostgreSQL, provisioning a database and user, writing a .env file, and registering a systemd unit running uvicorn on port 8000.
